chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI SUIT NO. 315/2015 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. FOR NON PROSECUTION OF CMA.4555/2015 2. FOR HEARING OF CMA NO.4556/2015 3. FOR HEARING OF CMA NO.2838/2015 02.04.2018 Mr. Mujataba advocate for plaintiff ---------------------------------- Learned counsel for the plaintiff places copy of order dated 07.07.2015 passed in Suit 28/2015 (Makkah Tourism (Pvt) Ltd. & others vs. Asma Maqsood & others) and submits in view of such he does not want to press instant suit which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI P.A
